en: Solomon was building his own house thirteen years, and he finished his entire house.
zh: 所羅門為自己建造宮殿花了十三年才完成。

en: He built the House of the Forest of Lebanon. Its length was a hundred cubits and its breadth fifty cubits and its height thirty cubits, and it was built on four rows of cedar pillars, with cedar beams on the pillars.
zh: 他又建造黎巴嫩林宮，長四十四公尺，寬二十二公尺，高十三公尺半。有四行香柏木的柱子，柱子上有香柏木的橫梁。

en: And it was covered with cedar above the chambers that were on the forty-five pillars, fifteen in each row.
zh: 柱子每行十五根，共四十五根；柱子上有廂房，是用香柏木蓋屋頂的。

en: There were window frames in three rows, and window opposite window in three tiers.
zh: 有窗框三行，窗與窗相對，共有三層。

en: All the doorways and windows had square frames, and window was opposite window in three tiers.
zh: 所有的門和窗都有四方的框子，有窗三層，窗與窗相對。

en: And he made the Hall of Pillars; its length was fifty cubits, and its breadth thirty cubits. There was a porch in front with pillars, and a canopy in front of them.
zh: 他又建造柱廊，長二十二公尺，寬十三公尺半。在柱廊前有廊子，在廊子前又有柱子和臺階。

en: And he made the Hall of the Throne where he was to pronounce judgment, even the Hall of Judgment. It was finished with cedar from floor to rafters.
zh: 又建造王室座廊，就是審判廊，他在這裡執行審判。由地板到天花板，都貼上香柏木板。

en: His own house where he was to dwell, in the other court back of the hall, was of like workmanship. Solomon also made a house like this hall for Pharaoh's daughter whom he had taken in marriage.
zh: 所羅門自己住的宮殿，是在廊後的另一個院內，建造法相同。他又為他娶法老的女兒建造一座宮院，建法與這廊子一樣。

en: All these were made of costly stones, cut according to measure, sawed with saws, back and front, even from the foundation to the coping, and from the outside to the great court.
zh: 從根基到屋簷，從外院到大院，這一切都是用貴重的石塊，按尺寸鑿好，用鋸子內外鋸齊的石塊建成的。

en: The foundation was of costly stones, huge stones, stones of eight and ten cubits.
zh: 根基也都是用貴重的大石塊；有長四公尺的，也有長三公尺半的。

en: And above were costly stones, cut according to measurement, and cedar.
zh: 上面有按著尺寸鑿好的貴重石塊和香柏木。

en: The great court had three courses of cut stone all around, and a course of cedar beams; so had the inner court of the house of the LORD and the vestibule of the house.
zh: 大院的周圍有鑿好的石頭三層，香柏木一層，與耶和華的內院和殿廊一樣。

en: And King Solomon sent and brought Hiram from Tyre.
zh: 所羅門王派人去把戶蘭從推羅接來。

en: He was the son of a widow of the tribe of Naphtali, and his father was a man of Tyre, a worker in bronze. And he was full of wisdom, understanding, and skill for making any work in bronze. He came to King Solomon and did all his work.
zh: 戶蘭是拿弗他利支派中一個寡婦的兒子；他父親是推羅人，是個銅匠。戶蘭滿有智慧、聰明和知識，能作各樣銅工；他來到所羅門王那裡，作王的一切工作。

en: He cast two pillars of bronze. Eighteen cubits was the height of one pillar, and a line of twelve cubits measured its circumference. It was hollow, and its thickness was four fingers. The second pillar was the same.
zh: 他鑄造了兩根銅柱，每根高八公尺，圓周五公尺三公寸。

en: He also made two capitals of cast bronze to set on the tops of the pillars. The height of the one capital was five cubits, and the height of the other capital was five cubits.
zh: 他又用銅鑄造了兩個柱頂，安放在柱頭上，每個柱頂高兩公尺兩公寸。

en: There were lattices of checker work with wreaths of chain work for the capitals on the tops of the pillars, a lattice for the one capital and a lattice for the other capital.
zh: 他又為柱頭上的柱頭頂做了兩塊網子和辮結成的鍊子，每個柱頂有七塊。

en: Likewise he made pomegranates in two rows around the one latticework to cover the capital that was on the top of the pillar, and he did the same with the other capital.
zh: 他又做了兩行石榴圍繞在柱頭上，柱頂的網子上，兩個柱頂都是這樣。

en: Now the capitals that were on the tops of the pillars in the vestibule were of lily-work, four cubits.
zh: 廊子裡柱頭上的柱頂，刻有百合花細工，一公尺八公寸。

en: The capitals were on the two pillars and also above the rounded projection which was beside the latticework. There were two hundred pomegranates in two rows all around, and so with the other capital.
zh: 兩根柱子上柱頂的鼓肚上，網子旁邊，各有石榴二百個，分兩行環繞著。

en: He set up the pillars at the vestibule of the temple. He set up the pillar on the south and called its name Jachin, and he set up the pillar on the north and called its name Boaz.
zh: 他把這兩根柱子豎立在殿廊的前面。豎立在南邊的柱子，他起名叫雅斤；豎立在北面的柱子，起名叫波阿斯。

en: And on the tops of the pillars was lily-work. Thus the work of the pillars was finished.
zh: 在柱子的上頭刻有百合花的細工。這樣，做柱子的工作就完成了。

en: Then he made the sea of cast metal. It was round, ten cubits from brim to brim, and five cubits high, and a line of thirty cubits measured its circumference.
zh: 他又鑄造了一座圓形的銅海，從這邊到那邊四公尺四公寸，高兩公尺兩公寸，圓周十三公尺兩公寸。

en: Under its brim were gourds, for ten cubits, compassing the sea all around. The gourds were in two rows, cast with it when it was cast.
zh: 在銅海邊緣以下有匏瓜圍繞著，每四十五公分十個。匏瓜共有兩行，是鑄造銅海的時候，一併鑄造上去的。

en: It stood on twelve oxen, three facing north, three facing west, three facing south, and three facing east. The sea was set on them, and all their rear parts were inward.
zh: 銅海安放在十二頭銅牛背上，三頭向北，三頭向西，三頭向南，三頭向東，銅海是在銅牛之上，牛尾都向內。

en: Its thickness was a handbreadth, and its brim was made like the brim of a cup, like the flower of a lily. It held two thousand baths.
zh: 銅海厚七公分半，邊緣好像杯子的邊緣，又好像百合花蕾，能盛水四萬公升。

en: He also made the ten stands of bronze. Each stand was four cubits long, four cubits wide, and three cubits high.
zh: 他又做了十個銅盆座；每個長一公尺八公寸，寬一公尺八公寸，高一公尺三公寸。

en: This was the construction of the stands: they had panels, and the panels were set in the frames,
zh: 盆座的做法是這樣：盆座有數邊，各邊都連接在盆架中。

en: and on the panels that were set in the frames were lions, oxen, and cherubim. On the frames, both above and below the lions and oxen, there were wreaths of beveled work.
zh: 在盆架間的各邊上，有獅子、牛和基路伯。盆架上有座，獅子和牛的上下都有花紋的浮雕。

en: Moreover, each stand had four bronze wheels and axles of bronze, and at the four corners were supports for a basin. The supports were cast with wreaths at the side of each.
zh: 每個盆座都有四個銅輪和銅軸，在盆座以下的四腳上有鑄成的支架，各邊都刻有花紋。

en: Its opening was within a crown that projected upward one cubit. Its opening was round, as a pedestal is made, a cubit and a half deep. At its opening there were carvings, and its panels were square, not round.
zh: 盆座的口從內緣到頂，高四十五公分。盆口作圓形，照盆架上那座的樣式，直徑六十六公分。盆口的邊上也有雕刻，盆座的邊是四方形，不是圓形的。

en: And the four wheels were underneath the panels. The axles of the wheels were of one piece with the stands, and the height of a wheel was a cubit and a half.
zh: 盆座的四個輪子是在盆邊的下面，輪座與軸相接，每個輪子高六十六公分。

en: The wheels were made like a chariot wheel; their axles, their rims, their spokes, and their hubs were all cast.
zh: 輪子的形狀，好像車輪的做法，輪軸、輪輞、輪輻、輪轂都是鑄成的。

en: There were four supports at the four corners of each stand. The supports were of one piece with the stands.
zh: 每一個盆座的四角都有四個支架；支架是與盆座一塊鑄成的。

en: And on the top of the stand there was a round band half a cubit high; and on the top of the stand its stays and its panels were of one piece with it.
zh: 盆座頂上有一個圓圈，高二十二公分；在盆座頂的座的撐子和邊緣是與座一塊鑄成的。

en: And on the surfaces of its stays and on its panels, he carved cherubim, lions, and palm trees, according to the space of each, with wreaths all around.
zh: 又在撐子和邊緣的上面刻有基路伯、獅子和棕樹，又在各空處，周圍刻上花紋。

en: After this manner he made the ten stands. All of them were cast alike, of the same measure and the same form.
zh: 他這樣做了十個盆座，鑄法、尺寸和樣式都是相同的。

en: And he made ten basins of bronze. Each basin held forty baths, each basin measured four cubits, and there was a basin for each of the ten stands.
zh: 他又做了十個銅盆，每個銅盆能盛水八百公升；每個銅盆的直徑都是一公尺八公寸。在十個盆座上，每個都安放一個銅盆。

en: And he set the stands, five on the south side of the house, and five on the north side of the house. And he set the sea at the southeast corner of the house.
zh: 他把五個盆座放在殿的南邊，五個放在殿的北邊，又把銅海放在殿的南邊，就是靠東南角的地方。

en: Hiram also made the pots, the shovels, and the basins. So Hiram finished all the work that he did for King Solomon on the house of the LORD:
zh: 戶蘭又做了盆子、鏟子和碗。這樣，戶蘭為所羅門王完成了在耶和華的殿裡所要作的一切工程。

en: the two pillars, the two bowls of the capitals that were on the tops of the pillars, and the two latticeworks to cover the two bowls of the capitals that were on the tops of the pillars;
zh: 所做的就是兩根柱子和在柱子頂上碗形的柱頂；兩塊遮蓋柱子頂上碗形柱頂的網子；

en: and the four hundred pomegranates for the two latticeworks, two rows of pomegranates for each latticework, to cover the two bowls of the capitals that were on the pillars;
zh: 在兩塊網子上的四百個石榴，每塊網子上有兩行石榴，遮蓋在柱子上頭兩個碗形的柱頂；

en: the ten stands, and the ten basins on the stands;
zh: 十個盆座和盆座上的十個銅盆；

en: and the one sea, and the twelve oxen underneath the sea.
zh: 一個銅海和銅海下的十二頭銅牛；

en: Now the pots, the shovels, and the basins, all these vessels in the house of the LORD, which Hiram made for King Solomon, were of burnished bronze.
zh: 鍋、鏟子和盤子。以上這一切器皿都是戶蘭為所羅門在耶和華的殿裡用磨亮的銅做成的。

en: In the plain of the Jordan the king cast them, in the clay ground between Succoth and Zarethan.
zh: 是王在約旦平原，在疏割與撒利但之間用泥模鑄造的。

en: And Solomon left all the vessels unweighed, because there were so many of them; the weight of the bronze was not ascertained.
zh: 這一切器皿所羅門都沒有稱算過；由於數量太多，銅的重量也無法估計。

en: So Solomon made all the vessels that were in the house of the LORD: the golden altar, the golden table for the bread of the Presence,
zh: 所羅門又做了耶和華殿裡的一切器具，就是金壇和放陳設餅的桌子，

en: the lampstands of pure gold, five on the south side and five on the north, before the inner sanctuary; the flowers, the lamps, and the tongs, of gold;
zh: 內殿前面的精金燈臺，右邊五行，左邊五行；還有金花、金燈盞，

en: the cups, snuffers, basins, dishes for incense, and fire pans, of pure gold; and the sockets of gold, for the doors of the innermost part of the house, the Most Holy Place, and for the doors of the nave of the temple.
zh: 精金的碗盆、燭剪、盤子、調羹和火鼎，內殿至聖所的門框和外殿的門樞。

en: Thus all the work that King Solomon did on the house of the LORD was finished. And Solomon brought in the things that David his father had dedicated, the silver, the gold, and the vessels, and stored them in the treasuries of the house of the LORD.
zh: 這樣，所羅門為耶和華的殿所作的一切工程都完成了。所羅門把他父親大衛分別為聖的金銀和器皿，都運了來，存放在耶和華殿的庫房裡。
